references.title: An Approach to Semantic-Aware Heterogeneous Network Embedding for Recommender Systems

annotations.text: Heterogenous Information network embedding-based Recommendations face challenges related with the heterogenous nature of the way users or items are represented. The authors propose a new form of recommendations SEMH4Rec that is meant to create better representations of users and items and feeds them to a Matrix Factorization algorithm.

The first representation is Co-occurrence representation learning which follow a random-walk and skip-grams to identify meta-paths. The second representation is semantic-aware representation learning. Both are combined to be fed as input to a matrix factorization algorithm. The approach is tested on multiple public datasets with other HIN recommenders.
